← the Atlas

kolu Release Runbook

reference · seedling ·proposed ·JUN 06, 2026

Cut a release with `just release X.Y` — tag master, promote the Unreleased changelog entry, GitHub release. The changelog is a website content collection the agent appends to per PR; kolu.dev renders it Unreleased-and-all.

Contents

  • The changelog is website content
  • Keeping it filled — two checkpoints, no CI gate
  • kolu.dev renders it — Unreleased included
  • Cutting a release
  • Wiring

Model — tag-on-master, rolling:

  • Ships only as a Nix flake; users track master (nix run github:juspay/kolu).
  • A release is a tag on master — a named point, a pin, a dated changelog entry. Nothing is published that master doesn’t already serve.
  • Version is X.Y, picked by hand (it’s an app, no API contract): .0 = milestone, .N = normal release. No .Z — rolling, no maintenance branch to patch.

The changelog is website content

  • A content collection beside the blog (blog collection — same shape), not a root CHANGELOG.md.
  • One entry per release; unreleased.mdx is the open one.
  • Authored per PR by /be — its implement step appends one line under the right ### heading (prose a user reads + a markdown PR link). No commit-prefix, no bump field.
  • ### Heads-up = disruptive changes (removed feature, changed default, migration), written for the user.
  • Conflict-free — unreleased.mdx merge=union in .gitattributes auto-resolves concurrent appends.
website/src/content/changelog/
  unreleased.mdx     ← agent appends here, every user-facing PR
  1-0.mdx            ← stamped { version: "1.0", date: 2026-06-06 } at release
---
version: Unreleased
---
### Added
- Compose surfaces as siblings — one canvas, no surface-app seams. ([#1201](https://github.com/juspay/kolu/pull/1201))
### Fixed
- Dock pings stop pulsing once you switch to the row. ([#1198](https://github.com/juspay/kolu/pull/1198))
### Heads-up
- `KOLU_STATE_DIR` moved under `$XDG_CONFIG_HOME/kolu`; existing sessions auto-migrate.

Keeping it filled — two checkpoints, no CI gate

  • Write time — /be authors the entry in its implement phase (be §2 — Add a changelog entry); every PR rides through /be.
  • Publish time — just release X.Y prints the exact Unreleased notes and waits for y; a thin section is visible right before it ships.
  • Enough for a single-maintainer, /be-driven repo. Add a merge-blocking changelog CI check (diff touches unreleased.mdx or no-changelog label) only once PRs arrive from contributors who don’t run /be.

kolu.dev renders it — Unreleased included

  • A /changelog page maps the collection newest-first, Unreleased on top — shipped and upcoming, and a live preview the moment a PR merges.
  • The changelog is website/**, so the existing Pages deploy already fires on every edit (pages.yml — on.push.paths website/**) — nothing extra to wire.

Cutting a release

One command. It shows the plan + the Unreleased notes, then prompts before any commit/push (n leaves the tree untouched — no --dry-run needed).

release
$ just release 1.0
✓ preflight: master · clean · synced with origin · CI green
will stamp ## Unreleased → 1-0.mdx { version: 1.0, date: 2026-06-06 }
will bump version → 1.0, commit, tag v1.0, push, gh release
── notes to publish ──────────────────────────────
Added: Compose surfaces as siblings — one canvas, no seams.
Fixed: Dock pings stop pulsing once you switch to the row.
Heads-up: KOLU_STATE_DIR moved; sessions auto-migrate.
──────────────────────────────────────────────────
Proceed? [y/N] y
→ committed release 1.0 + tag v1.0 · pushed · gh release created
✓ live: kolu.dev/changelog#v1-0 · github.com/juspay/kolu/releases/tag/v1.0
  • X.Y is an editorial call; everything up to the prompt is read-only.
  • Preflight refuses to tag anything CI hasn’t passed.
  • Pin any release: nix run github:juspay/kolu/v1.0.

Wiring

  • changelog collection — ✓ landed in #1208 (schema, /changelog page, seeded unreleased.mdx, merge=union).
  • Keep-it-filled — ✓ the /be implement-step entry (.apm/skills/be/SKILL.md:36); no CI gate.
  • just release X.Y — ⏳ the recipe above (stamp · bump · tag · push · gh release).
  • Identity rail — ⏳ collapse the two version = "0.1.0" literals (default.nix:56, default.nix:101) into one let version, stamp KOLU_VERSION beside KOLU_COMMIT_HASH (default.nix:203) → buildInfo cell → render 1.0 · a1b2c3d (IdentityRail srv column).

Status: proposed. Surface landed in #1208 ; still to build: the just release recipe + the KOLU_VERSION rail stamp. First run: just release 1.0.
